name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for PSKey
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it.
("I'm frustrated when …")

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope / impact

- Does this change the vault file format? [yes / no]
- Does this change the unlock / challenge flow? [yes / no]
- Does this add a new native capability (FS, network, clipboard)? [yes / no]

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or references.
